insight: gbrain 0.27.0 rejects source ids over 32 chars or with dots, so gstack-gbrain-sync must derive compact lowercase alnum-hyphen ids such as gstack-code-gstack-<hash> instead of canonical remote paths.
gbrain 0.27.0 does not expose put_page, so gstack-memory-ingest.ts currently fails historical transcript/artifact ingest until the helper is updated to the current gbrain CLI or MCP write API.
